outputs.description: Time represents the alert creation timestamp Date PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.credentialId
outputs.name: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.time

outputs.description: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.provider Provider is the cloud provider for example: AWS, GCP PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.serviceType
outputs.name: CredentialID is the id reference of the credential used

outputs.description: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.region Region is the region that was scanned, for example: GCP - "us-east-1", Azure - "westus" PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.project
outputs.name: ServiceType is the cloud service type for example: ECR, GCR

outputs.description: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.registry Registry is the Azure registry that was scanned, for example: testcloudscanregistry.azurecr.io PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.protected
outputs.name: Project is the GCP project that was scanned

outputs.description: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.total Total is total number of entities found in cloud scan PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.err
outputs.name: Protected is the number of protected entities (registries, functions, clusters)

outputs.description: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.name Name is the name of the entity PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.protected
outputs.name: Err holds any error found during a scan

outputs.description: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.lastModified LastModified is the modification time of the function Date
outputs.name: Protected indicates if the entity is protected

outputs.description: Runtime is runtime environment for the function, e.g. nodejs PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.version Version is the version of the entity
outputs.name: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.runtime

outputs.description: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.arn The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) assigned to the entity PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.status
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.runningTasksCount RunningTasksCount is the number of running tasks in ecs cluster PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.activeServicesCount
outputs.name: Status is the current status of entity

outputs.description: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.createdAt CreatedAt is the time when the entity was created Date
outputs.name: ActiveServicesCount is the number of active services in ecs cluster

outputs.description: NodesCount is the number of nodes in the cluster (aks, gke) PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.resourceGroup ResourceGroup is the the azure resource group containing the entity
outputs.name: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.nodesCount

outputs.description: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.containerGroup ContainerGroup is the azure aci container group the container belongs to PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.entities.image
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.collections Collections are the matched result collections PrismaCloudCompute.CloudDiscoveryAlert.accountID
outputs.name: Image is the image of an aci container
